<script>
var curProd='bubble';
var slides={stand:0,luxury:0};
var PRODS=['bubble','stand','luxury','arch','heart','cup12','cup24'];
var LABELS={bubble:'BUBBLE BALLOON',stand:'BALLOON ON STAND',luxury:'LUXURY BUBBLE BALLOON',arch:'FULL BALLOON ARCH',heart:'HEART FRAME',cup12:'BOX OF 12 CUPCAKES',cup24:'BOX OF 24 CUPCAKES'};
var NAMES={bubble:'Bubble Balloon',stand:'Bubble Balloon on Stand',luxury:'Luxury Bubble Balloon',arch:'Full Balloon Arch',heart:'Heart Frame',cup12:'Box of 12 Cupcakes',cup24:'Box of 24 Cupcakes'};
var FONTS={'Cormorant Garamond':'Script',Cinzel:'Serif',Georgia:'Bold','Dancing Script':'Cursive','Playfair Display':'Italic',Lato:'Clean'};

function showProduct(prod,btn){
document.querySelectorAll('.ptab').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
btn.classList.add('on');
document.querySelectorAll('.section-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
document.getElementById('ctrl-'+prod).classList.add('on');
PRODS.forEach(k=>{var w=document.getElementById('wrap-'+k);if(w)w.style.display=k===prod?'block':'none';});
document.getElementById('previewLabel').textContent=LABELS[prod]||prod.toUpperCase();
curProd=prod;
var hasCar=prod==='stand'||prod==='luxury';
document.getElementById('carCtrl').style.display=hasCar?'flex':'none';
if(hasCar)buildDots(prod);
}

function buildDots(prod){
var dots=document.getElementById('carDots');dots.innerHTML='';
var count=2;
for(var i=0;i<count;i++){
var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='c-dot'+(i===0?' on':'');
d.setAttribute('data-idx',i);d.onclick=(function(idx){return function(){goSlide(prod,idx);};})(i);
dots.appendChild(d);
}
}

function goSlide(prod,idx){
slides[prod]=idx;
for(var i=0;i<2;i++){
var el=document.getElementById('img-'+prod+'-'+i);
if(el)el.classList.toggle('show',i===idx);
}
document.querySelectorAll('#carDots .c-dot').forEach(function(d,i){d.classList.toggle('on',i===idx);});
}
function prevSlide(){var s=slides[curProd];goSlide(curProd,(s-1+2+2)%2);}
function nextSlide(){var s=slides[curProd];goSlide(curProd,(s+1)%2);}

function updateText(prod,val){
var el=document.getElementById('ov-'+prod);
if(!el)return;
el.textContent=val||'Your Message Here';
}

function setFont(prod,btn,font,fstyle){
document.querySelectorAll('#fonts-'+prod+' .font-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
btn.classList.add('on');
var el=document.getElementById('ov-'+prod);
if(el){el.style.fontFamily=font+",serif,sans-serif";el.style.fontStyle=fstyle||'normal';el.style.fontWeight=font==='Georgia'?'700':'normal';}
}

function setSwatchGroup(gid,btn,val){
document.querySelectorAll('#'+gid+' .swatch').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('on'));
btn.classList.add('on');
// If it's a text colour group
var prod=null;
if(gid.startsWith('tcol-')){
prod=gid.replace('tcol-','');
var el=document.getElementById('ov-'+prod);
if(el)el.style.color=btn.style.background;
}
}

function setPill(btn){
btn.closest('.pills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
btn.classList.add('on');
}

function getSelected(sel){
var el=document.querySelector(sel+' .on');
return el?el.title||el.textContent.trim():'Not selected';
}
function getInput(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);return el?el.value:'';}

function buildMsg(prod){
var lines=['🎨 *Design Order — Party Kreations*','','*Product:* '+NAMES[prod]];
if(['bubble','stand','luxury'].includes(prod)){
var ov=document.getElementById('ov-'+prod);
var msg=ov?ov.textContent:'';
if(msg==='Your Message Here')msg='Not provided';
var font=document.querySelector('#fonts-'+prod+' .font-btn.on');
var tcol=document.querySelector('#tcol-'+prod+' .swatch.on');
var rib=document.querySelector('#rb-'+prod+' .pill.on');
lines.push('*Message:* '+msg);
lines.push('*Font:* '+(font?font.textContent:'Script'));
lines.push('*Text Colour:* '+(tcol?tcol.title:'Gold'));
lines.push('*Ribbon:* '+(rib?rib.textContent.trim():'Gold'));
if(prod==='luxury'){
var feat=document.querySelector('#feat-luxury .swatch.on');
lines.push('*Feather Colour:* '+(feat?feat.title:'Blue'));
}
} else if(prod==='arch'||prod==='heart'){
var occ=document.querySelector('#occ-'+prod+' .pill.on');
var c1=document.querySelector('#col1-'+prod+' .swatch.on');
var c2=document.querySelector('#col2-'+prod+' .swatch.on');
var c3=document.querySelector('#col3-'+prod+' .swatch.on');
lines.push('*Occasion:* '+(occ?occ.textContent.trim():'Birthday'));
var cols=[c1?c1.title:'Gold',c2?c2.title:'White'];
if(c3)cols.push(c3.title);
lines.push('*Colour Scheme:* '+cols.join(' · '));
if(prod==='arch'){
var sty=document.querySelector('#ctrl-arch .pills .pill.on:not(#occ-arch .pill)');
lines.push('*Style:* '+(sty?sty.textContent.trim():'Organic'));
}
var n=getInput('notes-'+prod);
if(n)lines.push('*Notes:* '+n);
} else if(prod==='cup12'||prod==='cup24'){
var fr=document.querySelector('#frost-'+prod+' .swatch.on');
var oc=document.querySelector('#occ-'+prod+' .pill.on');
var fl=document.querySelector('#flav-'+prod+' .pill.on');
var tp=getInput('top-'+prod);
lines.push('*Frosting:* '+(fr?fr.title:'Blush Pink'));
lines.push('*Occasion:* '+(oc?oc.textContent.trim():'Birthday'));
lines.push('*Flavour:* '+(fl?fl.textContent.trim():'Vanilla'));
if(tp)lines.push('*Topper:* '+tp);
}
lines.push('','_Designed at partykreations.co.uk_ ✨');
return lines.join('\n');
}

function sendWA(prod){window.open('https://wa.me/447717436091?text='+encodeURIComponent(buildMsg(prod)),'_blank');}
function sendEmail(prod){
var subj='Design Order — '+NAMES[prod]+' | Party Kreations';
window.location.href='mailto:partykreationsuk@gmail.com?subject='+encodeURIComponent(subj)+'&body='+encodeURIComponent(buildMsg(prod).replace(/\*/g,''));
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
